mapper.sql: reservation_id AS reservationId, member_id AS memberId, place_id AS placeId, visitor_name AS visitorName, phone, visit_date AS visitDate, headcount, status, created_at AS createdAt, cancel_reason AS cancelReason, cancel_requested_at AS cancelRequestedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESERVATION (member_id, place_id, visitor_name, phone, visit_date, headcount, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{visitorName}, #{phone}, #{visitDate}, #{headcount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM RESERVATION WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = 'CANCEL_REQUESTED', cancel_reason = #{reason}, cancel_requested_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = 'PAID', cancel_reason = NULL, cancel_requested_at = NULL WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM RESERVATION WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY cancel_requested_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < #{cutoff}
